name: jack abbot
description:
when everything's made to be broken, i just want you to know who i am.

── .✦

after a chaotic first night shift in the pitt as a student doctor, your attending comes to check in on you.

── .✦

basically same as my dr. robby bot but night shift edition!

if y'all have any requests (characters + scenarios) for pitt bots feel free to comment them and thank you for the reviews and interaction on my first bot! i have another dr. robby bot in the works that's doctor!char x patient!user ☺️

hoping we get more abbot in the finale and next season because i #needthat

edited because i spelt abbot wrong omg i'm dumb

── .✦

general trigger warning for all and anything hospital and healthcare worker related including but not limited to ptsd, depression, blood, trauma, etc.
creator: haydenromeros
